title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLVII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
There was a little boy and a little girl
        Lived in an alley;
        Says the little boy to the little girl,
        "Shall I, oh! shall I?"

        Says the little girl to the little boy,
        "What shall we do?"
        Says the little boy to the little girl,
        "I will kiss you."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLVII. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
